title: Enhanced Grass
description: This adds more variants to grass and its model, with the goal of grass being more organic.
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03cd4c3482c037be755276bc0b9a45c28f0019b7.png)
# What does it do?
This makes grass look more organic and provides multiple varient of grass when placed in the world. this also makes grass more fluffy because of the extra grass textures added to the bottom of the grass model.

## Tall Grass
Tall grass has 3 varients and they all have the fluffy grass part on the bottom
![grass tall](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aad8ef8e552c8da5a20be893e0b031e1a40d18d2_0.webp)
## Short Grass
Short grass has 3 varients too but also includes more or less fluffy grass parts on the bottom
![grass short](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62fa59e8a65d6960795b149ba8bcc350f1ea6fe9_0.webp)
